subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast kindled the lamp of guidance within the crystal of aspiration! By my life, the hosts of divine confirmation are assuredly advancing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استوقد سراج الهدایه فی زجاجه المنشاد لعمری ان عرمرم التایید مقبل من
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
